languages.text: {n}Взгляд мужчины на мгновение проясняется: кажется, будто первый раз за это время он по-настоящему понял, кто с ним разговаривает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Взгляд мужчины на мгновение проясняется: кажется, будто первый раз за это время он по-настоящему понял, кто с ним разговаривает.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The man's gaze clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he truly understands who is speaking to him.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Взгляд мужчины на мгновение проясняется: кажется, будто первый раз за это время он по-настоящему понял, кто с ним разговаривает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The man's expression clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he has truly understood who is speaking to him.{/n}
{n}The man's expression clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he has truly understood who is speaking to him.{/n}
{n}The man's gaze clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he truly understands who is speaking to him.{/n}
{n}The man's gaze clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he truly understands who is speaking to him.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Für einen kurzen Moment wird der Blick des Mannes klar. Er scheint seit geraumer Zeit das erste Mal zu erkennen, wer mit ihm spricht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man's gaze clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he truly understands who is speaking to him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Für einen kurzen Moment wird der Blick des Mannes klar. Er scheint seit geraumer Zeit das erste Mal zu erkennen, wer mit ihm spricht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le regard de l'homme s'éclaircit l'espace de quelques instants, comme si, pour la première fois depuis longtemps, il comprenait vraiment qui s'adresse à lui.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man's gaze clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he truly understands who is speaking to him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard de l'homme s'éclaircit l'espace de quelques instants, comme si, pour la première fois depuis longtemps, il comprenait vraiment qui s'adresse à lui.{/n}

languages.text: {n}男人的眼神清明了一瞬。过了这么久，他似乎第一次真正明白，自己是在跟谁说话。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man's gaze clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he truly understands who is speaking to him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}男人的眼神清明了一瞬。过了这么久，他似乎第一次真正明白，自己是在跟谁说话。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La mirada del hombre se aclara momentáneamente. Parece que, por primera vez en bastante tiempo, entiende de verdad con quién está hablando.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man's gaze clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he truly understands who is speaking to him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La mirada del hombre se aclara momentáneamente. Parece que, por primera vez en bastante tiempo, entiende de verdad con quién está hablando.{/n}

languages.text: {n}男の表情が一瞬晴れた。久しぶりに、誰が自分に話しかけているのかを本当に理解したようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man's expression clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he has truly understood who is speaking to him.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Adamın bakışları bir anlığına netleşiyor. Sanki uzun zamandır ilk kez kendisiyle kimin konuştuğunu gerçekten anlıyor gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man's gaze clears for a moment. It seems as though, for the first time in a while, he truly understands who is speaking to him.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Adamın bakışları bir anlığına netleşiyor. Sanki uzun zamandır ilk kez kendisiyle kimin konuştuğunu gerçekten anlıyor gibi görünüyor.{/n}
